texto: Soup is a lot like a family. Each ingredient enhances the others each batch has its own characteristics and it needs time to simmer to reach full flavor.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Marge Kennedy: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Soup is a lot like a family. Each ingredient enhances the others each batch has its own character…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, time, soup pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de soup e reach.

texto: One of the silliest lines ever said in a feature film came from Love Story the 1970s hit which immortalized the phrase "Love means never having to say you're sorry." There are few people who would actually want to share a life with someone who held that concept near and dear.
explicacao: Citação de Marge Kennedy sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “One of the silliest lines ever said in a feature film came from Love Story the 1970s hit which im…” articula reflexao, companionship, silliest em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: In truth a family is what you make it. It is made strong, not by number of heads counted at the dinner table, but by the rituals you help family members create, by the memories you share, by the commitment of time, caring, and love you show to one another, and by the hopes for the future you have as individuals and as a unit.
explicacao: Citação de Marge Kennedy sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “In truth a family is what you make it. It is made strong, not by number of heads counted at the d…” articula reflexao, family, love em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como love e memories.
